cobblemon.species.woolipup.name: Woolipup
cobblemon.species.woolipup.desc: This simple pokémon believes Wooloo and Mareep to be one of it's own. It is known to challenge opponents twice it's size to protect it's herd.
cobblemon.species.lupelt.name: Lupelt
cobblemon.species.lupelt.desc: It's loyalt to a fault, it will never back down from a fight. It's wool builds up so much it struggles to move.
cobblemon.species.nitkick.name: Nitkick
cobblemon.species.nitkick.desc: It is a powerful pokémon, but its stubbornness against following orders makes it an unpopular choice.
cobblemon.species.anonkey.name: Anonkey
cobblemon.species.anonkey.desc: It destroys everything in its path. There is no reason, it is chaos incarnate. One kick could send even a snorlax flying.
cobblemon.species.pumpkid.name: Pumpkid
cobblemon.species.pumpkid.desc: This Pokémon is known to care for the crops of farmers. It is commonly seen sunbathing.
cobblemon.species.gallagourd.name: Gallagourd
cobblemon.species.gallagourd.desc: This Pokémon protects weaker Pokémon from their predators. If it is ever separated from its iron suit, it returns to being a Pumpkid.
cobblemon.species.pumpkit.name: Pumpkit
cobblemon.species.pumpkit.desc: This Pokémon hides in pumpkin patches, waiting for bird Pokémon to land nearby. It is commonly mistaken for Pumpkid, causing it to be taken in.
cobblemon.species.gallowgourd.name: Gallowgourd
cobblemon.species.gallowgourd.desc: It is ruthless in how it delivers it's twisted justice. It is commonly mistaken for Gallagourd, and the two Pokémon have an intense rivalry. Gallagourd attempts to stop it's violence, even protecting villains from Galloguard.
cobblemon.species.parropot.name: Parropot
cobblemon.species.parropot.desc: An ancient Pokémon, it searches for objects to put in it's head. The reason is unknown.
cobblemon.species.parropot-honeypot.desc: An ancient Pokémon, the honey in it's head puts bug Pokémon in a trance.
cobblemon.species.parropot-flowerpot.des: An ancient Pokémon, the flower in it's head is always in bloom no matter the weather.
cobblemon.species.parropot-candle.desc: An ancient Pokémon, the candle in it's head never goes out, no matter how hard one may try.
cobblemon.species.parropot-quill.desc: An ancient Pokémon, the quill in it's head is always flowing, even when the wind is still.
cobblemon.species.bruital.name: Bruital
cobblemon.species.bruital.desc: It carves the icicle in it's hand obsessively. The nutrients from it's diet makes this Pokémon toxic to consume by would-be predators.
cobblemon.species.shivor.name: Shivor
cobblemon.species.shivor.desc: This persistent Pokémon will stalk prey for days, waiting for the perfect moment to strike, moving faster than one would first think. It prepares it's meals with the icicle it carries.
cobblemon.species.siphosail.name: Siphosail
cobblemon.species.siphosail.desc: It drifts across looking for Localusk nests to conquer. A group of Siphosail is called a fleet.
cobblemon.species.serasea.name: Serasea
cobblemon.species.serasea.desc: It gently drifts in the dark depths. Spotting a Serasea in open waters is considered a bad omen
cobblemon.species.cephcery.name: Cephcery
cobblemon.species.cephcery.desc: A devious Pokémon, it confuses it's prey by shifting the colors on it's body. It utilizes forbidden powers from worlds beyond.
cobblemon.species.cephcery-gmax.desc: It has become a vessel for the forbidden powers it wields, projecting them in a more pure form. Looking at it for too long can cause one to lose their mind.
cobblemon.species.ocatalyst.name: Ocatalyst
cobblemon.species.ocatalyst.desc: It uses the alchemical flask on its tail to brew strange concoctions from berries. Its surpisingly sanitary.
cobblemon.species.gourmooze.name: Gourmooze
cobblemon.species.gourmooze.desc: It implements nutrients into it's body directly, becoming more powerful. It is exceptionally difficult to satisfy it's unique tastes in food.
cobblemon.species.souslag.name: Souslag
cobblemon.species.souslag.desc: It travels far and wide for the best ingredients. While having a short temper, it is quite satisfied when it's food is enjoyed by others. It is said this Pokémon taught humanity how to freeze food in ancient times.
cobblemon.species.ghasp.name: Ghasp
cobblemon.species.ghasp.desc: This weak Pokémon struggles to breath often. Helium seems to aid it's affliction.
cobblemon.species.ghasthma.name: Ghasthma
cobblemon.species.ghasthma.desc: It had taken it's last breath, it now wanders taking the air from the lungs of others. It seems to be in a constant state of discomfort.
cobblemon.species.elatephyr.name: Elatephyr
cobblemon.species.elatephyr.desc: While it still has breathing problems, they are much deminished, allowing it to live normally. It is acutely aware of weather patterns, and warns other Pokémon.
cobblemon.species.icken.name: Icken
cobblemon.species.icken.desc: This Pokémon is not normally desired, even by would-be predators. It is surprisingly intelligent.
cobblemon.species.cluckenstein.name: Cluckenstein
cobblemon.species.cluckenstein.desc: It is reckless in behavior, often injuring those around it during it's experiments. Once it decides on a tasks, it's tunnel vision is unbreakable.
cobblemon.species.reanderthral.name: Reanderthral
cobblemon.species.reanderthral.desc: In an attempt to achieve immortality during evolution, the body gained a consciousness of it's own. It original commands the newborn mind, to little effect.
cobblemon.species.reanderthral-mega.desc: It's two minds have achieved an enlightened symbyosis. They are perfectly in sync, and have become a perfect combination of brain and brawn.
cobblemon.species.bowne.name: Bowne
cobblemon.species.bowne.desc: It carries a handcrafted bow of bone at all times. This Pokémon is never seen without it.
cobblemon.species.bognmarrow.name: Bognmarrow
cobblemon.species.bognmarrow.desc: It patrols its territory with a platoon of fellow Bognmarrow. Whichever one has the bigger mushroom is the leader... allegedly.
cobblemon.species.ivorice.name: Ivorice
cobblemon.species.ivorice.desc: While a solitary Pokémon, it sometimes hunts with Pokémon of similar cruelty, such as Weavile or Froslass. It always aims for the legs to paralyze it's prey.
cobblemon.species.withereign.name: Withereign
cobblemon.species.withereign.desc: This sinister Pokémon absorbs the souls of both its enemies and allies to fuel its power.
cobblemon.species.withereign-mega.desc: It's destructive power has been multiplied by Mega-Evolution. Now nothing can stop it's quest of world domination.
cobblemon.species.tormniac.name: Tormniac
cobblemon.species.tormniac.desc: Despite it's dreadful appearance, it's quite friendly. It consumes the nightmares of others, leading to a peaceful sleep.
cobblemon.species.shellin.name: Shellin
cobblemon.species.shellin.desc: It hides in it's iridescent shell, firing a poisonous needle when threatened. It hates interacting with others, and is easily irritated.
cobblemon.species.cerebug.name: Cerebug
cobblemon.species.cerebug.desc: While weak on it's own, together they are terrifyingly efficient. It feeds on the energies of other Pokémon like a parasite.
cobblemon.species.foocoon.name: Foocoon
cobblemon.species.foocoon.desc: It incubates to achieve a powerful form. Despite this, it commands Cerebug telepathically like a commander of an army.
cobblemon.species.iotlander.name: Iotlander
cobblemon.species.iotlander.desc: The leader of it's colony, with absolute authority. It is believed this Pokémon came from another dimension to invade our world for it's life energy.
cobblemon.species.iotlander-mega.desc: It has become an exceptional strategist. It commands other Iotlander, alongside their colonies, on long military campaigns of expansion.
cobblemon.species.decayed.name: Decayed
cobblemon.species.decayed.desc: This Mythical Pokémon decays anything it touches. It it said this Pokémon was created by Zygarde to counteract Xerneas.
cobblemon.species.decayed-rejuv.desc: This Mythical Pokémon rejuvenates anything it touches. It it said this Pokémon was created by Zygarde to counteract Yveltal.
cobblemon.move.badinput.desc: This move inflicts physical or special damage, whichever will be more effective. The user distorts the fabric of reality, randomizing it's type in the process.
cobblemon.move.blastospore.desc: The user explodes in a cloud of spores to inflict damage on adjacent foes. The user faints upon using this move.
cobblemon.move.blunderpowder.desc: The user fires a musketball of mud at the target. The spore powder damages Pokémon next to the target as well.
cobblemon.move.dealer.desc: The user shuffles the items of every Pokémon on the field, randomly giving each Pokémon an item.
cobblemon.move.eldereye.desc: The user fires a crystaline beam of energy at the target. If this move is used while raining, it electrifies the target's next move.
cobblemon.move.fester.desc: The user feasts on the target's natural energies. This move always hits and the user's Attack is raised if the target is a Psychic, Dark or Grass-type.
cobblemon.move.frostbolt.desc: The user fires a crossbow bolt of ice at the target's weakpoints. This may leave the target paralyzed.
cobblemon.move.mishap.desc: The user spills a strange brew on the target to confuse it. However, this also sharply raises the target’s Attack stat.
cobblemon.move.overcharge.desc: The user overcharges it's joints, battering the target. If it's partner is Electric-Type, a random stat of that Pokémon is raised. Cannot be used twice in a row.
cobblemon.move.rapidfire.desc: The user fires three sandballs in quick succession. This move has a heightened chance of landing a critical hit, may burn and flinch the target.
cobblemon.move.siphon.desc: This move inflicts physical or special damage, whichever will be more effective. The user's HP will be restored by a portion of the damage dealt. If the user is at full hp, instead of healing it will summon grassy terrain.
cobblemon.battle.activate.siphon: %1$s's overabundance of energy summoned grassy terrain!
cobblemon.move.soulfireblade.desc: The user slashes the target with a blade of soulfire. This may leave the target with a burn.
cobblemon.move.treefell.desc: The user attacks by hacking at the target with a blade. This move is super effective on Grass-type Pokémon.
cobblemon.move.whiplash.desc: The user whips the target with high speed winds. This move always goes first and is boosted if used in tailwind.
cobblemon.battle.activate.whiplash: The move was boosted by the flowing winds!
cobblemon.move.asphyxiate.desc: The user attacks by drawing in the air from the opponent. Removes the effects of Tailwind from the opposing side.
cobblemon.move.backburn.desc: The user snuffs out the opponent with it's own flames. This move is super effective on Fire-type Pokémon.
cobblemon.move.evaporate.desc: The user heats the area so much water turns to steam. If the target uses a Water-type move, it fails.
cobblemon.move.gmaxbizarre.desc: A Psychic-type attack that Gigantamax Cephcery use. This move makes opponents only use attacking moves
cobblemon.ability.anarchist.desc: Boosts the Attack stat of this Pokémon when hit by a Fighting-type move. This Pokémon cannot be confused.
cobblemon.ability.anomaly.desc: While this Pokémon is on the field, type interactions are reversed.
cobblemon.battle.activate.anomaly: %1$s twisted reality! Type matchups have been reversed!
cobblemon.ability.appetite.desc: When this Pokémon eats a berry, it transforms into it's obese form.
cobblemon.ability.brainworm.desc: The Pokémon adds the psychic type to the attacker if it makes direct contact.
cobblemon.ability.culinary.desc: Doubles the benefits of consumed berries for allies.
cobblemon.ability.darksorcery.desc: This Pokémon's Psychic-type moves can hit Dark-types
cobblemon.ability.determination.desc: When this Pokémon is knocked out, instead of immediately fainting, it still continues the rest of it's turn. It faints when it's turn ends.
cobblemon.ability.dragonheart.desc: This Pokémon's Dragon-type moves are boosted and have a chance to flinch while in psychic terrain.
cobblemon.ability.lastgrasp.desc: The Pokémon gains more health from sources of recovery. If Grassy Terrain is active, the Pokémon rejuvenates and achieves it's true form.
cobblemon.ability.maritime.desc: This Pokémon's Rock-type moves are boost and are perfectly accurate in rain.
cobblemon.ability.mentor.desc: Damaging charging moves for both this Pokémon and it's ally happen in a single turn instead.
cobblemon.battle.activate.mentor.self: %1$s uses a technique to speed up the process!
cobblemon.ability.neurotoxin.desc: Pokémon poisoned by the user's moves will also have their speed stat lowered.
cobblemon.ability.oxidize.desc: When hit by a Water or Electric-type move, this Pokémon envelops itself in a veil made of energy and regains some HP every turn.
cobblemon.ability.savagery.desc: Instead of being confused, a random stat is raised.
cobblemon.ability.silvertongue.desc: This Pokémon's Steel-type moves may lower the target's speed.
cobblemon.ability.sirenscall.desc: The Pokémon draws in all Ghost-type moves. Instead of taking damage from them, its Sp. Def stat is boosted.
cobblemon.ability.echochamber.desc: While this Pokémon is on the field, If a Sound-based move is used every turn, they do greater damage
cobblemon.ability.climatechange.desc: When this Pokémon switches in, it cycles any primary weathers active into another.
